title: Business Breakfast | Stock/Share Market News | 28th April 2026 || TV5 Money Live

recommendations.stock: Schneider Electric / Techno Electric / GE Vernova
recommendations.note: Staggered buy on a long-term power/electrification theme
recommendations.detail: Asked about buying all three (already risen a lot), Kutumba Rao said don't wait for a dip. If investing about Rs 5 lakh, deploy about Rs 1 lakh immediately and add on every dip. This is a long-term theme, not short-term; these companies can perform well over the next two to three years, so avoid FOMO buying at the highs later.

recommendations.note: Something is cooking in Ambuja and ACC; definitely buy
recommendations.detail: A viewer holding 100 shares at a 20% loss asked about adding another 100. Kutumba Rao said to buy, noting that something is cooking in Ambuja and ACC and that at some point he would definitely recommend buying.
On a viewer query, Kutumba Rao said to accumulate SBI.
A viewer wanted to accumulate Sanhi Hotels; Kutumba Rao advised to wait rather than buy now.

recommendations.note: Hold patiently; bought at high rates
recommendations.detail: A viewer holding 100 shares of HDFC bought at Rs 600-800 (plus Lara around Rs 960) asked whether to hold or sell. Kutumba Rao said to hold with patience, since they were bought at high (not cheap) rates and these are good stocks.

recommendations.note: Good company doing well; hold, can average on results
recommendations.detail: A viewer at large losses across several names asked about Natco Pharma (also Powermech, CMS Info, Avro). Kutumba Rao said Natco is a good company doing very well (around Rs 1100) and to hold patiently, watch the results, and one could even average. He noted Powermech depends on whether it was bought pre- or post-split and the buyer's average.

recommendations.stock: CG Power / GE Vernova / CAMS / Sirma SGS / Kaynes
recommendations.note: Hold; CG Power back at 52-week high, transformer-capacity shortage a tailwind
recommendations.detail: A viewer holding these at 25% profit asked whether to hold. Kutumba Rao said hold all of them. CG Power has come back to its 52-week high and the 840-850 levels are likely to be crossed; there is an endless shortage of transformer capacity, making it a great opportunity for these companies. Good stocks bought, patience needed.
